pulley_system_diagram: The image shows one ideal block-and-tackle pulley system with upper and lower blocks, vertical supporting strands, optional cut non-supporting strands, a load, and an effort arrow.

query:missing_effort_force_value.answer_hint: set "answer" to the requested integer force value
query:missing_effort_force_value.annotation_hint: set "annotation" to an object with keys "supporting_strands_region", "known_force_label", and "unknown_force_label", each mapped to one [x0, y0, x1, y1] pixel box
